FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.41sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f9ee1589640>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-25T00:23:48Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-25T00:22:01Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-25T00:23:48Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-25T00:22:01Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/06/25 00:25:24.454512853 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454520558 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454571213 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454572826 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454593084 {
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454594186 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454607591 new <- list()
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454608663 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454622830 new$width <- width
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454623701 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454639621 new$height <- height
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454640733 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454656102 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454657074 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454672122 new$title <- title
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454672984 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454687882 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454688643 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454709663 new$version <- version
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454710605 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454724891 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454725763 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454740571 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454741373 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454756090 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454756882 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454770547 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454773052 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454787629 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454788451 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454803960 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454804812 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454832995 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454834047 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454850387 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454851249 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454866528 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454867329 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454926070 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454927633 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454946127 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454947169 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454966816 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454967808 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454986203 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454987155 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455005008 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455005810 "default"))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455023703 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455024525 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455040054 }
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455040876 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455056495 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455057336 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455073587 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455074468 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455121797 }
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455123270 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455137527 }
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455138308 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455151794 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455152706 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455172323 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455177783 domain = NA)
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455199584 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455200966 }
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455215173 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455216055 old$family <- family
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455231374 }
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455232315 version <- old$version
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455244498 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455245390 "2.0")
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455258605 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455259466 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455275827 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455276699 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455291206 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455292138 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455308589 domain = NA)
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455309440 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455325871 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455326662 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455346580 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455347572 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455370776 invisible()
2026/06/25 00:25:24.455371757 }

2026/06/25 00:25:24.454710605 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454724891 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/25 00:25:24.454725763 if (!missing(encoding))

2026/06/25 00:25:24.454741373 if (!missing(bg))

2026/06/25 00:25:24.455005810 "default"))

2026/06/25 00:25:24.455040054 }

2026/06/25 00:25:24.455121797 }

2026/06/25 00:25:24.455137527 }

2026/06/25 00:25:24.455199584 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)

2026/06/25 00:25:25.779621877 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/06/25 00:25:25.779644209 {

2026/06/25 00:25:25.779705424 new$version <- version
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779705905 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779724931 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779726013 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779740941 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779741803 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779759860 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779761382 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779775910 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779776942 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779790597 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779791168 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/06/25 00:25:25.779836724 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779889774 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779891296 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779907617 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779908479 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779925147 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779927893 if (!missing(producer))

2026/06/25 00:25:25.779953691 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779969391 new$author <- author
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779970232 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779989278 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/25 00:25:25.779990320 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/25 00:25:25.780021589 "default"))

2026/06/25 00:25:25.780032058 family <- family$metrics

2026/06/25 00:25:25.780059971 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/06/25 00:25:25.780101319 }

2026/06/25 00:25:25.780213078 if (!checkIntFormat(file))

2026/06/25 00:25:25.780233206 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
